aliases: National National Parks ServicePark Service, NPS
National United States Parks ServicePark Service of the United States
description_wiki: The National Park Service (NPS) is an agency of the United States federal government, within the United States Department of the Interior.
The September 11 attacks, colloquially known as 9/11, were a coordinated series of suicide attacks perpetrated by the Islamist terrorist organization al-Qaeda against the United States in 2001.

description: historic building in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA
description_wiki: Independence Hall is a historic civic building in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, where both the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution of the United States were debated and adopted by the Founding Fathers of the United States.

aliases: The Statue of Liberty Enlightening the World
description: American icon in New York, United States
description_wiki: The Statue of Liberty (Liberty Enlightening the World; French: La Liberté éclairant le monde) is a colossal neoclassical sculpture of a robed and crowned woman on Liberty Island in New York Harbor, within New York City.

description: World War II Japanese-American internment camp in California
description_wiki: Manzanar is the site of one of ten American concentration camps, where more than 120,000 Japanese Americans were incarcerated during World War II, from March 1942 to November 1945.
